summary: Verified the original init-path gap no longer reproduces. A fresh disposable git repo initialized by flywheel-loop now receives .flywheel/INCIDENTS.md, the selected mission-anchor-drift incident slug is present, and init planned_writes includes the repo-local INCIDENTS target.

Unselected canonical incidents are not wholesale-copied
acceptance_gates.evidence: Existing regression test check_init_distributes_selected_incidents includes this assertion; the focused probe confirms selected-incident rendering rather than full canonical INCIDENTS copy.

validation.result: rc=0; planned_writes includes .flywheel/INCIDENTS.md; generated .flywheel/INCIDENTS.md exists; mission-anchor-drift-sub-mission-promotion present

residuals: tests/flywheel-loop-core.sh contains a focused rx1t regression, but the full suite currently hangs later in strict doctor canonical-sync/fleet probing. This closeout does not claim the unrelated full core suite is green.
operator_value: New repos initialized into the flywheel now inherit the mission-anchor-drift lesson at install time instead of rediscovering the same failure class after the first loop.
